sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (data Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_map SET data = mapMerge(data, {'extra':'newvalue'}) WHERE mapContainsKeyLike(data, 'pattern%');
SELECT mapContainsKeyLike(data, 'name%') AS key_exists FROM test_map;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_map WHERE mapContainsKeyLike(data, 'value%') = 1;
